title: tephrosia juncea
intro: Tephrosia juncea, also known as Horsefly Bush, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia juncea include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, Tephrosia juncea is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
